Read the per-unit point-estimate vector (length J) from an eb_estimates

Source: R/class-objects-output.R
dot-gp_estimates_theta.Rd

The installed ebrecipe eb_estimates stores point estimates as theta_hat. The estimate fallback is retained only for older stand-ins and cached tests.

Usage

.gp_estimates_theta(estimates)

Developed by JoonHo Lee.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
